requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling under GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 (Kuwait/KUCAS)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——GSO/IEC 60335-2-24下的R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（科威特/KUCAS）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——GSO/IEC 60335-2-24下的R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（科威特/KUCAS）

summary.en: Household refrigerators entering Kuwait predominantly use R-600a (isobutane, GWP ~3), and the refrigerant aspect is assessed within KUCAS against the GSO-adopted safety standard GSO IEC 60335-2-24, whose flammable-refrigerant provisions (the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex on flammable refrigerants) set the maximum R-600a charge per appliance configuration, ventilation requirements, and ignition-source controls. Manufacturers must: (1) verify the R-600a charge complies with the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant charge limits for the relevant compartment/room-volume configuration; (2) declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge quantity (grams) in the product documentation and on the rating plate, consistent with the Kuwait 240 V / 50 Hz rating; and (3) confirm the appliance carries the appropriate flammable-refrigerant warning markings. Kuwait follows the GCC/GSO route and the Montreal Protocol Kigali Amendment for HFC phase-down; R-600a being a hydrocarbon is well-positioned and not subject to HFC phase-down restrictions. Any HFC-charged models (e.g. R-134a) should be assessed against the applicable GSO/Kigali phase-down schedule.
summary.zh: 进入科威特的家用电冰箱主要使用R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3），制冷剂方面在KUCAS框架内依据GSO采纳的安全标准GSO IEC 60335-2-24进行评估，其可燃制冷剂条款（IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂附件）规定了每种器具配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风要求及点火源控制。制造商须：（1）核实R-600a充注量符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24针对相关隔间/房间容积配置的可燃制冷剂充注量限值；（2）在产品文件及铭牌上声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）和充注量（克），并与科威特240 V / 50 Hz额定值一致；（3）确认器具加贴适当的可燃制冷剂警示标识。科威特遵循GCC/GSO路径及《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》进行HFC削减；R-600a作为碳氢化合物条件良好，不受HFC削减限制约束。任何充注HFC的型号（如R-134a）应针对适用的GSO/基加利削减计划进行评估。
summary.zht: 進入科威特的家用電冰箱主要使用R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3），製冷劑方面在KUCAS框架內依據GSO採納的安全標準GSO IEC 60335-2-24進行評估，其可燃製冷劑條款（IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑附件）規定了每種器具配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風要求及點火源控制。製造商須：（1）核實R-600a充注量符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24針對相關隔間/房間容積配置的可燃製冷劑充注量限值；（2）在產品文件及銘牌上聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）和充注量（克），並與科威特240 V / 50 Hz額定值一致；（3）確認器具加貼適當的可燃製冷劑警示標識。科威特遵循GCC/GSO路徑及《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》進行HFC削減；R-600a作為碳氫化合物條件良好，不受HFC削減限制約束。任何充注HFC的型號（如R-134a）應針對適用的GSO/基加利削減計畫進行評估。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household refrigerating appliances; flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits, ventilation and ignition-source provisions (adopted within KUCAS)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol — Kigali Amendment HFC phase-down (GCC/Kuwait route) — relevant to any HFC-charged models, not to R-600a
KUCAS (PAI) — refrigerant charge and documentation assessed within the technical evaluation

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits at the appliance level through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates the R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, and through GB 9237 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Because both China and GSO ultimately reference IEC 60335-2-24 for flammable-refrigerant safety, the technical basis is closely aligned, but the charge verification and documentation must be presented within the KUCAS technical evaluation rather than relying on a Chinese CCC report alone.
summary.zh: 中国在器具层面通过GB 4706.13-2014处理可燃制冷剂（R-600a）充注量限制，该标准纳入了源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定，并通过GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）加以管理。中国依据《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。由于中国与GSO最终都参照IEC 60335-2-24进行可燃制冷剂安全管理，技术基础高度一致，但充注量核实和文件须在KUCAS技术评估内呈现，而非仅依赖中国CCC报告。
summary.zht: 中國在器具層面通過GB 4706.13-2014處理可燃製冷劑（R-600a）充注量限制，該標準納入了源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定，並通過GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）加以管理。中國依據《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。由於中國與GSO最終都參照IEC 60335-2-24進行可燃製冷劑安全管理，技術基礎高度一致，但充注量核實和文件須在KUCAS技術評估內呈現，而非僅依賴中國CCC報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentation and charge verification rather than a fundamental technology gap, since GB 4706.13 and GSO IEC 60335-2-24 share the IEC lineage: (1) the charge verification and refrigerant declaration must be presented inside the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report, not just a Chinese CCC report; (2) the R-600a charge must be confirmed against the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant limits for the relevant configuration, and the declaration (R-600a, charge in grams) and warning markings must be carried on documentation and rating plate consistent with the Kuwait 240 V / 50 Hz rating; (3) any model still using R-134a or another HFC should be assessed against the applicable GSO/Kigali HFC phase-down schedule for the GCC before export. The exact current GSO edition and any GCC-specific deviations should be confirmed before submission.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距在于文件和充注量核实，而非根本性技术差距，因为GB 4706.13与GSO IEC 60335-2-24同源于IEC：（1）充注量核实和制冷剂声明须在KUCAS技术评估报告内呈现，而非仅凭中国CCC报告；（2）R-600a充注量须针对相关配置依据GSO/IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂限值确认，声明（R-600a、充注量以克计）及警示标识须载于文件和铭牌并与科威特240 V / 50 Hz额定值一致；（3）任何仍使用R-134a或其他HFC的型号，应在出口前针对适用于海湾的GSO/基加利HFC削减计划进行评估。应在提交前确认当前确切的GSO版本及任何海湾专属偏差。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距在於文件和充注量核實，而非根本性技術差距，因為GB 4706.13與GSO IEC 60335-2-24同源於IEC：（1）充注量核實和製冷劑聲明須在KUCAS技術評估報告內呈現，而非僅憑中國CCC報告；（2）R-600a充注量須針對相關配置依據GSO/IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑限值確認，聲明（R-600a、充注量以克計）及警示標識須載於文件和銘牌並與科威特240 V / 50 Hz額定值一致；（3）任何仍使用R-134a或其他HFC的型號，應在出口前針對適用於海灣的GSO/基加利HFC削減計畫進行評估。應在提交前確認當前確切的GSO版本及任何海灣專屬偏差。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level — R-600a charge limits and flammable-refrigerant provisions of GSO IEC 60335-2-24 are assessed within KUCAS; HFC phase-down via GCC/Kigali applies to any HFC-charged models
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: Public Authority for Industry (PAI) — KUCAS, Kuwait / GSO

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant for Kuwait-market household refrigerators and is well-positioned (hydrocarbon, not subject to HFC phase-down). Because GB 4706.13 and GSO IEC 60335-2-24 share the IEC lineage, the gap is documentation and charge verification: the R-600a charge, declaration, and warning markings must be confirmed against GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 limits and presented within the KUCAS technical evaluation, rated for 240 V / 50 Hz. Any HFC-charged models should be assessed against the GCC/Kigali phase-down schedule.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是科威特市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，条件良好（碳氢化合物，不受HFC削减约束）。由于GB 4706.13与GSO IEC 60335-2-24同源于IEC，差距在于文件和充注量核实：R-600a充注量、声明及警示标识须针对GSO/IEC 60335-2-24限值确认，并在KUCAS技术评估内呈现，按240 V / 50 Hz标定。任何充注HFC的型号应针对GCC/基加利削减计划进行评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是科威特市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，條件良好（碳氫化合物，不受HFC削減約束）。由於GB 4706.13與GSO IEC 60335-2-24同源於IEC，差距在於文件和充注量核實：R-600a充注量、聲明及警示標識須針對GSO/IEC 60335-2-24限值確認，並在KUCAS技術評估內呈現，按240 V / 50 Hz標定。任何充注HFC的型號應針對GCC/基加利削減計畫進行評估。
